seoTitle: How to Add a Milestone in Monday.com (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Learn how to turn task rows into diamond-shaped milestone markers in Monday.com and visualize them on Gantt and calendar views.
intro: Milestones help teams see the checkpoints that matter most among dozens of everyday tasks. This guide explains how to convert a standard task row in Monday.com into an official milestone marker, track its phase with a status column, and set up alerts so stakeholders know the moment a milestone is reached. It's built for anyone managing a project timeline that needs clearer high-priority markers.

steps.heading: Select the task to convert
steps.body: Navigate to your master project board and choose or create the task row you want to turn into a milestone.

steps.heading: Open the Timeline or Date cell settings
steps.body: Click into the cell settings for the Timeline or Date column where the milestone option lives.

steps.heading: Convert it to a milestone marker
steps.body: Change the standard date duration into a diamond-shaped milestone marker with a single click.

steps.heading: Track milestone phases with a status column
steps.body: Add a dedicated Status column with options like Not Started, In Progress, Achieved, or Delayed to track progress.

steps.heading: View milestones on Gantt and Calendar
steps.body: Switch to Gantt Chart or Calendar views to see milestones visually separated from everyday operational tasks.

steps.heading: Automate stakeholder alerts
steps.body: Set up low-code automations to notify stakeholders via Slack, email, or internal notifications the moment a milestone is achieved.

faq.question: How do I turn a regular task into a milestone?
faq.answer: Open the Timeline or Date column's cell settings and change the standard date duration into a diamond-shaped milestone marker.

faq.question: Can I track different milestone stages?
faq.answer: Yes, pair the milestone with a Status column set to values like Not Started, In Progress, Achieved, or Delayed.

faq.question: Will milestones show up differently on the timeline?
faq.answer: Yes, milestones appear as diamond markers on Gantt and Calendar views, distinct from regular task bars.

faq.question: Can my team get notified automatically when a milestone is hit?
faq.answer: Yes, low-code automations can alert stakeholders via Slack, email, or internal notifications when a milestone status changes.
